head.hi: The British Embassy to the Department of State
head.note: Left with the Secretary of State by the British Ambassador, June 6, 1922.

div.p: His Majesty’s Ambassador has been requested to express to the United States Government the cordial appreciation of His Majesty’s Government of their decision to participate in the proposed enquiries in regard to alleged deportations and outrages in Anatolia.
Both the French and Italian Governments have also agreed to be represented on the Commissions.
As soon as the Secretary of State has sent instructions to Constantinople and Athens His Majesty’s Government will select the requisite officials to represent them on the two Commissions.
